div.div:
Keep SMB, VPN, and HTTPS as separate access profiles.
private-vpn-mtls terminates device certificates at Caddy while File Browser can stay on proxy-auth mode behind that edge.
The share root is a bind-mounted staging tree, not the canonical file location, and host-only secrets or reports stay out of commits.

switch.text: Keep SMB, VPN, and HTTPS as separate access profiles....
